namespace Thinktecture.Tests;

partial class Outer<T>
{
partial class TestValueObject :
   global::System.Numerics.IDivisionOperators<global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject, global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject, global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject>
{
   /// <inheritdoc cref="global::System.Numerics.IDivisionOperators{TSelf, TOther, TResult}.op_Division(TSelf, TOther)" />
   public static global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject operator /(global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject left, global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject right)
   {
      global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(left);
      global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(right);
      return Create((left._value / right._value));
   }

   /// <inheritdoc cref="global::System.Numerics.IDivisionOperators{TSelf, TOther, TResult}.op_Division(TSelf, TOther)" />
   public static global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject operator checked /(global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject left, global::Thinktecture.Tests.Outer<T>.TestValueObject right)
   {
      global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(left);
      global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(right);
      return Create(checked((left._value / right._value)));
   }
